defmodule MyApp.Orders do
  def total(items) do
    items
    |> Enum.map(& &1.amount)
    |> IO.inspect(label: "amounts")
    |> Enum.sum()
  end
end

defmodule MyApp.Orders do
  require Logger

  def total(items) do
    Logger.debug(fn -> ["computing total for ", inspect(length(items)), " items"] end)
    items |> Enum.map(& &1.amount) |> Enum.sum()
  end
end

defmodule MyApp.OrdersTest do
  use ExUnit.Case

  test "prints intermediate state for diagnosis" do
    [1, 2, 3] |> IO.inspect(label: "items") |> Enum.sum()
  end
end
